channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish across road and pavement, 26th March
item.description:
Bags have been torn probably by foxes right near parking bays

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road work barriers left on site, 26th March
item.description:
Barriers left by road work contractors. Have been there for over a week..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valan Leas, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty nappy and other rubbish, 26th March
item.description:
A bag of rubbish next to the public litter bin has been tossed around the pavement. Not only is there a dirty nappy, there is poo and other rubbish strewn about the pavement. Given it's a key route to the local bus stop and school, it would be great to get this cleaned up ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes on carriageway, 26th March
item.description:
Half of the road is covered in 10s of potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersgate Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak, 26th March
item.description:
This is our water meter outside our house. We reported it on 9th March (when the weather dried up and we noticed the leak, but it would have been there before but due to all the rain it wasn’t noticed), Thames water were waiting for Bromley Council to permit works, which I think has now been scheduled for 13-15th April, but why is it such a long wait and also after the Easter holidays when it will cause much more disruption?! So much water being wasted and I hope this won’t be logged as our water usage! Also why will it take 3 days? This is a leak caused by Thames water themselves when they came to fit a new meter a month ago, didn’t fit the new meter, and left it like this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tudor Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building at entrance to telephone mast, 26th March
item.description:
Crumbling wall. Deteriorating for many months. Potential hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Swain's Lane, Highgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Restaurants (Pizarro, Franca Manca etc) dumping trash on street, 26th March
item.description:
Restaurants on Bermondsey street by Jose Pizarro, Caphe House, Franca Manca are dumping their trash on the street. These attract rodents and foxes, spreading diseases on the street. Unsafe for children especially toddlers. Street is also extremely dirty and sticky.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lamb Walk, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa and green waste, 26th March
item.description:
Can you please and clear up the area I would also recommend a CCTV to deter bad behavior

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste and dog poo on pavement, 26th March
item.description:
Food waste and dog poo on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, Landor Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on pavement & street all down Grove Lane, 26th March
item.description:
Litter build up on the road & pavement presumably from missed public bin collections & windy conditions. Needs attention asap please as it's polluting, unsightly & unsanitary.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Grove Lane, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole outside 93 Church Road southbound, 26th March
item.description:
Pothole here is incredibly dangerous for cyclists as cyclists keeping left in traffic have to go into it because of its size, and not possible to drive around if car also in lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Church Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch, 26th March
item.description:
Tree branch

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nealden Street, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree, 26th March
item.description:
The tree is blocking footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolf Close, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 fridges on street outside garage with broken glass and nails, 26th March
item.description:
Garage clearance left on street for last week with bits of broken glass and nails strewn around
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbots Way, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped stuff from garages, 26th March
item.description:
Boxes Present since 25th march

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapter Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reminds of dog mess to be cleared, 26th March
item.description:
Reminds of dog mess to be cleared
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, East Dulwich Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes, 26th March
item.description:
POT HOLES found pot holes causing motorists to swerve to avoid them close to crossing centre island has potentail to be dangerous please raise to borough to repair.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Church Hill Road, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Single Bed Base on Rushet Road, outside the entrance to Flats 29-35, 26th March
item.description:
The bed base has been sat there for over 2 weeks, keeps blowing over in the wind which is preventing residents from parking in that spot as they don't want to risk it blowing over whilst their vehicle is there. Making it extremely inconvenient, especially if the road becomes busy in terms of parking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rushet Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in front garden and strewn across street from 26 Beechfield road, 26th March
item.description:
Overfull front garden, rubbish going across street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beechfield Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned cupboard, 26th March
item.description:
Still there but fallen over and glass broken. Please collect asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maidenstone Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
